description: Agent lifecycle management: create workspace, spawn zellij tab, track state (agent_manager.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: AgentManager.__init__
key_interfaces.description: Initialize with IRC config, username, channels, zellij session, state file, project dir

key_interfaces.name: AgentManager.create
key_interfaces.description: Create and launch a new agent: pre-check IRC, scope name, create workspace, spawn tab, wait for ready marker

key_interfaces.name: AgentManager.stop
key_interfaces.description: Stop an agent: force-stop tab, set offline, cleanup workspace

key_interfaces.name: AgentManager.restart
key_interfaces.description: Stop then re-create agent with same config (channels, type)

key_interfaces.name: AgentManager.list_agents
key_interfaces.description: Return all agents dict with refreshed alive status

key_interfaces.name: AgentManager.get_status
key_interfaces.description: Return single agent info dict with refreshed status

key_interfaces.name: AgentManager.send
key_interfaces.description: Send text to agent's zellij tab pane via write-chars + Enter

key_interfaces.name: _find_channel_pkg_dir
key_interfaces.description: Locate zchat-channel-server package dir in uv tool venv

user_flows.name: create agent
steps: _spawn_tab: write .zchat-env, run start.sh in new zellij tab
_auto_confirm_startup: background thread to auto-confirm Claude prompts

user_flows.name: stop agent
steps: _force_stop: run pre_stop hook from template, then close_tab

user_flows.name: send text to agent
steps: check agent alive via zellij tab_exists
